heading: Today
text: Some valley fog early.  Mostly sunny.  Highs in the 70s, near 70 over the higher terrain north.  Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph west of the Green Mountains.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with some clouds arriving late.  Some areas of river valley fog.  Lows in the upper 40s to mid 50s.  Winds light east of the Green Mountains, and south to southwest 5 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Wednesday
text: Areas of fog early, burning off to sunshine, mixed with clouds.  A chance of a few showers in the afternoon.  Highs in the 70s to near 80.  Winds increasing from the south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
